title: Regulatory uncertainty clouds the future of dark stores in India
description: India’s booming quick commerce sector—known for delivering groceries and daily essentials in as little as 10 minutes may be heading toward a regulatory crossroads. Growing scrutiny from policymakers and trade bodies has raised serious questions about whether the business models adopted by several leading platforms comply with India’s foreign direct investment (FDI) rules governing e-commerce.
